name: Bisquick Apricot-Glazed Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a tube pan, 10x4 inches.
3. In a large bowl, beat together Bisquick, 1 1/2 cups sugar, 1/2 cup flour, margarine, eggs, cream cheese, vanilla extract, and salt on low speed until well combined. Scrape the bowl frequently for 30 seconds.
4. Beat on medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally, for an additional 4 minutes.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 55-60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
8. To prepare the topping, heat 1/2 cup sugar and water together until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 2 minutes. Stir in the liqueur. Let it cool to lukewarm.
9. Slowly drizzle the topping over the cake, allowing some to drip down the sides.
10. For the glaze, heat apricot preserves and 1/4 cup sugar until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for an additional 1-2 minutes. Allow the glaze to cool slightly before spreading it evenly over the top of the cake.
